2026-04-22T06:44:19.8244757Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd
2026-04-22T06:44:19.8245228Z with:
2026-04-22T06:44:19.8245806Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-22T06:44:19.8246749Z   script: const { setupGlobals } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/setup_globals.cjs');
setupGlobals(core, github, context, exec, io);

await main();
